body: As negotiators from India and the US begin what seems like the final round of talks before formally signing a bilateral trade agreement, Commerce and Industry Ministry officials Monday said New Delhi is seeking an edge over Asian competitors under the new set of Section 301 tariffs Washington is expected to announce before July end. title: ICMAI Pune Chapter elects CMA Rahul Chincholkar as chairman for 2026-27

The new team, including vice-chairman CMA Himanshu Dave, secretary CMA Tanuja Mantrawadi, and treasurer CMA Ameya Tikale, aims to boost professional development and explore emerging fields like AI. The chapter plans workshops and guidance sessions for members and students.

title: TEDxDYPWS Youth 2026 Amplifies the ‘Voices of Tomorrow’

title: TGPSC recruitment 2026: Notification released for 222 Assistant Executive Engineer posts, registration begins on this date

Candidates need a Civil Engineering degree, with age limits from 18 to 44. A written exam will determine selection for this promising career opportunity.

title: CGBSE Chhattisgarh Board Class 10, 12 supplementary exam 2026 dates out: Check complete schedule

These 'Second Main' exams, offering a chance to improve scores or pass subjects, will take place in July. Both examinations will be held in a single morning shift, with Class 12 exams running from July 8-22 and Class 10 from July 9-21.

title: CBSE OSM row: Centre shunts out top officials as S. Radha Chauhan takes charge of procurement probe
body: In a significant development, the Centre has transferred CBSE's chairman and secretary amidst the On-Screen Marking (OSM) controversy. A formal inquiry into the digital evaluation system's procurement has been ordered, with a committee tasked to submit its findings within a month. This action follows student complaints and allegations of tender irregularities.

title: Not loyalty, not passion, just money: US workers stay put because leaving feels financially impossible
body: A recent survey reveals that financial constraints, not job satisfaction, are keeping most US employees in their current roles. With limited savings, many workers feel they cannot afford to leave, even if disengaged. This financial tether means loyalty is secondary to economic necessity for a significant portion of the workforce.

title: CBSE re-evaluation portal hit by cyberattack attempts, reports DoS attack as 16,000 students submit applications
body: CBSE reported that its re-evaluation portal faced multiple cyberattack attempts while processing over 16,000 student submissions for verification and re-evaluation of Class 12 answer sheets. The board said a denial-of-service attack generated nearly 1.5 million hits within two minutes, along with over one lakh unauthorized access attempts. Despite the disruptions, the platform remained operational. The portal, delayed for infrastructure upgrades, will stay open until June 6 with extended session

The committee is reviewing the digital evaluation system's functioning and student concerns about transparency. Officials from the Ministry of Education and CBSE also presented their responses.
